query: SELECT DISTINCT action, entityType, COUNT(*) as total FROM crm_activity_log GROUP BY action, entityType ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT DISTINCT action, entityType, COUNT(*) as total FROM crm_activity_log GROUP BY action, entityType ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;
